englishDefinitions: (idiomatic) Expressing that people are arguing or competing without regard to propriety, restraint, feelings, or (even) safety.
persianTranslation: (اصطلاحاً) بیان این که مردم بدون توجه به شایستگی، خویشتن داری، احساسات یا (حتی) ایمنی با هم بحث می کنند یا با هم رقابت می کنند.
examples: The gloves are off in this match; both teams are purposely committing fouls against opposing players!
In the early years after 9/11, it was often said of antiterrorism that "the gloves are off now."
